span.p: Within scope but at the boundary

span.p: Yes - capable of delivering the care

span.p: Gap can be closed in time

span.p: Gap cannot be closed in time

span.p: Yes - acuity rate is set correctly

span.p: Rate has not been set for this acuity level

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the resident's care needs fall within the community's licensed scope of care?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Decline - refer to appropriate care level and document the decision

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the community have the staffing and equipment to deliver the required care safely?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Can the gap be closed before the move-in date?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the acuity justify a rate that covers the care cost?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Conditional acceptance - complete staffing or equipment before move-in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Accept with full acuity-based rate - update care plan at move-in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Price the care level before accepting - do not accept at a rate that does not cover cost
